protein_name: Thiol protease which is believed to participate in intracellular degradation and turnover of proteins. Cleaves matrix extracellular phosphoglycoprotein MEPE. Has also been implicated in tumor invasion and metastasis. Belongs to the peptidase C1 family. Expressed in the stratum spinosum of the epidermis. Weak expression is detected in the stratum granulosum. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.
